messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Audio conversation mode with the coordinator over Telegram: transcribe inbound voice notes (STT) and reply with synthesized voice notes (TTS), coordinator-first; other roles are an explicit follow-up slice
What it solves: EPIC — VOICE I/O ON THE EXISTING COORDINATOR CONVERSATION. This does NOT give
the coordinator new domain responsibilities and does NOT change the coordinator
role at all. The audio I/O lives ENTIRELY in the front-desk bot (extension host,
tools/telegramFrontDeskBotCore.ts + tools/telegram-front-des…
How it works: A principal's voice note in the coordinator's Operator topic is transcribed and delivered to the coordinator as text
